title: 2021 SHOP health plan information for small businesses
page_name: 2021 SHOP health plan information for small businesses
page_topic: 2021 SHOP health plan information for small businesses
content:
The data below includes 2021 health plans available to businesses in states where the federal government is operating the SHOP Marketplace. States not represented in this data run their own SHOP Marketplaces.

For 2020 health plan information for small businesses, visit this page.

Note: The data below will be most useful to developers, professionals, researchers, and others who want to study, analyze, and download the complete dataset of 2021 plan and price information. For all others, please use our more user-friendly tool for previewing 2021 plans and prices.

Data is also available on 2021 stand-alone dental plans. See available dental plans.

View instructions or download (ZIP file).

Learn more about the Affordable Care Act.
